title: cyperus niveus
intro: Cyperus niveus, also known as Snow Flax Lily, is a type of aquatic or semi-aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Cyperus niveus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and prevent the growth of certain bacteria. In herbal preparations, Cyperus niveus can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
